kpi_definitions.title: Security Event Ingestion Rate
kpi_definitions.description: Measures the rate of security-relevant events being ingested into the SIEM platform
kpi_definitions.base_search: index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=per_index_thruput series=idx_security* | stats sum(ev) as events_per_interval

kpi_definitions.title: Correlation Search Execution Health
kpi_definitions.description: Tracks the success rate and performance of security correlation searches
kpi_definitions.base_search: index=_internal source=*scheduler.log savedsearch_name=*correlation* | stats count(eval(status="success")) as success, count(eval(status="failed")) as failed, count as total | eval health_pct=round(success/total*100,2)

kpi_definitions.title: Authentication Failure Rate
kpi_definitions.description: Monitors the rate of authentication failures across all identity sources
kpi_definitions.base_search: index=auth action=failure | timechart span=5m count as failure_count

kpi_definitions.title: Malware Detection Count
kpi_definitions.description: Tracks malware detections across endpoint protection platforms
kpi_definitions.base_search: index=endpoint sourcetype=*antivirus* action=blocked OR action=quarantined | stats count by signature, host

kpi_definitions.title: Vulnerability Scan Coverage
kpi_definitions.description: Percentage of assets scanned within the defined scan window
kpi_definitions.base_search: index=vulnerability sourcetype=*scan_result* | stats dc(dest) as scanned_assets | appendcols [| inputlookup asset_inventory.csv | stats count as total_assets] | eval coverage=round(scanned_assets/total_assets*100,2)
